22. Which of the following is true about base
pairing in DNA — (Pg. 97, E)
A) Adenine forms two hydrogen bond with
Guanine
B) Adenine forms three hydrogen bond
with Guanine
C) Adenine forms two hydrogen bond with
Thymine
D) Adenine forms three hydrogen bond
with Thymine
23. Which of the following is true about base
pairing in DNA —(Pg. 97, E)
A) Guanine forms two H-bond with
Cytosine
B) Guanine forms three H-bond with
Cytosine
C) Guanine forms two H-bond with
Adenine
D) Guanine forms three H-bond with
Adenine
24. Uniform distance between two stands of
Helix is due to (Pg. 97, E)
A) Double and triple bond formed between
base pairs
B) Sugar — phosphate backbone
C) Purine — pyrimidine base pairing
D) None of these
25. How many of the following statements
about Double — helix structure of DNA is
correct (Pg. 97, E)
i) Two chains are coiled in right — handed
fashion
ii) Pitch of helix is 3.6 nm
iii) There are roughly 10 bp in each turn
iv) Plane of one base pair stacks over the
other
A) 1 B) 2
Cc) 3 D) 4
26. Pitch of helix in double helix DNA is —(Pg.
98, E)
A) 3.6 nm B) 3.4 nm
C) 3.2nm D) 3.8 nm
27. Central dogma in molecular biology was
proposed by —(Pg. 98, E)
A) Crick B) Watson
C) F. Meischar D) Chragaff
28. Identify correct labels —(Pg. 98, E)
